heading: Critical skill training bonus
label: 2319 Critical skill training bonus
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 374 of this title
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 374 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary may provide a bonus, not to exceed $20,000, to an enlisted member who completes training in a skill designated as critical, if at least four years of obligated active service remain on the member’s enlistment at the time the training is completed. A bonus under this section may be paid in a single lump sum or in periodic installments.

children.label: b
children.text: If an enlisted member voluntarily or because of misconduct does not complete the member’s term of obligated active service, the Secretary may require the member to repay the United States, on a pro rata basis, all sums paid under this section. The Secretary may charge interest on the amount repaid at a rate, to be determined quarterly, equal to 150 percent of the average of the yields on the 91-day Treasury bills auctioned during the calendar quarter preceding the date on which the amount to be repaid is determined.
